root.not_found_desc: Head back to your portfolio to continue.
root.site_description: Invest, track your performance, measure your impact. A clear, responsible experience.

cookie_notice.text: Seedow doesn't use any advertising or audience-measurement cookies. Only strictly necessary information (session, preferences) is stored locally in your browser.

landing.meta_desc: Enter your portfolio, get a transparent analysis: weighted score, coverage rate, honest blind spots. No investment pitch.
landing.og_desc: Transparent analysis. Enter your portfolio, see what it really funds.
landing.subtitle: Your money is already shaping the world. Seedow shows you which one.
landing.manifesto_text: A portfolio is not a collection of lines and numbers. It's a statement. Every euro invested supports a vision of the world.

story.1_body: For years, we've been encouraged to think carefully about what we consume: sustainable products, less waste, responsible companies. Yet almost no one asks a simple question — what is my money actually financing when I invest? Buying a stock or an ETF takes seconds; understanding its real-world impact can take hours, and most investors never find out.
story.2_body: A portfolio is more than a collection of assets. It's a statement. Every investment supports companies, industries, and business models that shape the world around us. Without realizing it, your money may be funding the future you believe in — or one that contradicts your values.
story.3_body: Seedow makes the invisible visible. In seconds, we analyze your investments and reveal the story behind your portfolio — not just its financial performance, but its impact, its footprint, the values it supports.
story.4_body: We believe investing shouldn't be blind. Our mission is to help people understand where their money goes and what kind of future it helps create. Because before changing the world, you should know what your money is already building.

landing.demo_desc: Type a ticker, see what your portfolio would say. A taste of the full analysis.
landing.demo_data_note: {{name}} · demo data, full analysis on your real portfolio.
landing.demo_unknown: Unknown ticker in demo. Try AAPL, TSLA, TTE, MC or NESN.

pillars.1_body: Weighted ESG score on your real portfolio. No simulation, no marketing ranking.
pillars.2_body: Every figure shows its source and date. The methodology is public and reproducible.
pillars.3_body: Uncovered holdings stay visible. An honest analysis beats a misleading average.

landing.method_desc: Sector exclusions, weighted ESG scores, explicit coverage rate, time-stamped sources. Every figure can be traced back to its public source.

faqs.a1: Seedow analyzes your existing portfolio through an ESG lens. You enter your holdings (ISIN or ticker, amount or %), we compute a weighted average score, a data coverage rate and surface the blind spots. No investment pitch — just reading.
faqs.q2: Where do the ESG scores come from?
faqs.a2: Data comes from public providers (Yahoo Finance ESG, MSCI ESG when available). Every score shows its source and date. Uncovered holdings are flagged as ‘unanalyzable’ — not hidden.
faqs.a3: The analysis is free. Later, Seedow will offer a paid realignment service (actionable recommendations, monitoring). The analysis itself will stay open.
faqs.a4: No bank data is stored. You enter your holdings manually. You can export or delete your account at any time.

landing.final_title_a: Your savings deserve to be read.
landing.footer_copy: © 2026 Seedow — Editorial reading of your savings.

auth.desc_signup: Test phase — no real transactions. Demo mode only.
auth.desc_beta_full: All 300 beta seats are taken. Leave your email for the next wave.
auth.desc_waitlisted: You're #{{position}} on the list. We'll let you know as soon as a seat opens.

beta.feedback_desc: 3 questions max. Anonymous to the team unless you want us to reach back.
beta.feedback_nps_label: Would you recommend Seedow? (0 = no, 10 = yes)

certificate.meta_desc: Personal edition of the Seedow impact certificate.
certificate.no_portfolio: No active portfolio — no certificate to issue.
certificate.subtitle: Impact certificate · Personal edition
certificate.methodology_body: Indicators are computed from the actual portfolio composition, weighted by the ESG exposures of underlyings (exclusion filter, best-in-class selection, composite E/S/G score). CO₂ avoided is an indicative estimate derived from ESG scores, not a regulatory figure.

alerts.empty: No drift detected on your active portfolio. We'll let you know as soon as a holding moves away from your values or target allocation.

values.ethiMessage: Hi, I'm Ethi ✨ I'll help you build your portfolio today. First, tell me: what really matters to you?
values.question: Choose your causes — you can pick several.

exclusions.ethiMessage: Perfect 💚 And on the flip side, what do you absolutely refuse to fund?
exclusions.question: These sectors will be fully excluded.

objective.ethiMessage: Noted. Now: for what objective do you want to grow this capital?
objective.question: Your main goal

intro.title: Let's build your portfolio.
intro.description: Four questions, two minutes. Ethi structures an allocation aligned with your convictions and exclusions.

reglages.meta_desc: Manage your profile, investment preferences and notifications.
reglages.title: Settings
reglages.subtitle: Profile, preferences, transparency.
reglages.auto_recalc_note: Any change triggers an automatic recalculation of your portfolio through the full pipeline (exclusions → best-in-class → constrained Markowitz optimization → conviction tilts).
reglages.privacy_desc: Your data stays strictly confidential. You can export or delete all your information at any time.
reglages.delete_account_warning: This action is irreversible: your profile, portfolios, goals and all your data will be permanently deleted. There is no way back.
reglages.delete_account_confirm_label: Type your email address ({{email}}) to confirm.
reglages.market_data_desc: Prices are refreshed automatically every business day at close. You can force an immediate update here.
reglages.no_runs: No run logged yet. Force a refresh above to start tracking.
reglages.pipeline_desc: Six traceable steps: profiling, investable universe, sector exclusions, best-in-class ESG filters, constrained Markowitz optimization (ESG floor, risk budget, weight bounds), then pre-optimization tilt of expected returns based on your causes. The interactive simulator and detailed documentation are on the dedicated page.
reglages.engine_version_desc: Methodology v1.1 · E/S/G pillars weighted by causes, real carbon intensity, source traceability. Reviewed quarterly.

market_data.title: Market data
market_data.desc: Prices are automatically refreshed every business day at close. You can force an immediate update here.

health.title: Data health
health.empty: No logged executions yet. Force a refresh above to start tracking.

risk_model.title: Risk model
risk_model.desc: Expected return, volatility and covariance are recomputed from the real price history (rolling 2 years). An asset whose history is still too short is left unchanged rather than recomputed on an unreliable basis.
risk_model.health_empty: No logged recomputes yet. Run one above to start tracking.

pipeline.title: Construction pipeline
pipeline.desc: Six traceable steps: profiling, investable universe, sector exclusions, best-in-class ESG filters, constrained Markowitz optimization (ESG floor, risk budget, weight bounds), then pre-optimization tilt of expected returns according to your causes. The interactive simulator and detailed documentation are on the dedicated page.

sources.title: Data sources
sources.esg: ESG scores by pillar (E/S/G): MSCI ESG Research, Sustainalytics, ESG Book, Yahoo Sustainability
sources.carbon: Carbon intensity (gCO₂e/€ invested): Trucost, ISS ESG, Yahoo Sustainability — with date and provider stored per asset
sources.sfdr: SFDR classification: issuer prospectuses (iShares, Lyxor, Amundi)
sources.prices: Prices and volatilities: Yahoo Finance, 5-year historical series, covariances recalculated weekly

esg_composite.title: Composite ESG score, weighted by your causes
esg_composite.desc_1: The ESG score ranges from 0 to 100.
esg_composite.desc_2: Instead of a fixed 40/40/20 average, the E, S, and G pillars are reweighted based on the causes you activate in your preferences. The score thus reflects what really matters to you.
esg_composite.pillar_e: Environment (E) — scope 1-2-3 CO₂ emissions, carbon intensity, water, waste, renewables exposure.
esg_composite.pillar_s: Social (S) — human rights, working conditions, gender equality, product safety, community relations.
esg_composite.pillar_g: Governance (G) — board independence, executive compensation, tax ethics, transparency, anti-corruption.
esg_composite.fallback_note: When a pillar is not published for an asset, we automatically fall back on the global ESG score (documented fallback).
esg_composite.mapping_e: Climate, Biodiversity, Circular economy → boost the E pillar
esg_composite.mapping_s: Human rights, Gender equality → boost the S pillar
esg_composite.mapping_sg: Ethical tech → boost the S and G pillars
esg_composite.mapping_note: Without an active cause, we revert to the neutral 40/40/20 weighting. The more causes you activate related to a pillar, the more its weight in the composite score increases.
esg_composite.portfolio_desc: It is the weighted average of the composite score of each line by its weight. A default ESG floor of 70 is imposed on the optimizer; if it finds no feasible solution, the floor is relaxed and an esg_floor_relaxed flag is raised for transparency.
esg_composite.warning: An ESG rating remains an estimation dependent on the quality of published data. Each asset stores the score source (esg_score_source) for traceability.

carbon.title: Carbon footprint: heuristic + real
carbon.desc: Two indicators deliberately coexist while real data coverage reaches 100% of the portfolio:
carbon.avoided: Avoided CO₂ (heuristic) — indicative estimation derived from the composite ESG score. Practical for comparing two portfolios, not a regulatory figure.
carbon.intensity: Real carbon intensity — weighted average of gCO₂e/€ invested/year on the portion of the portfolio actually covered by a provider (carbon_intensity_* fields with source and update date). A coverage indicator is displayed in the methodology page.
carbon.coverage_title: Low coverage? Heres what to do
carbon.coverage_low: < 30% — rely on avoided CO₂ heuristic, real intensity is not representative.
carbon.coverage_medium: 30–70% — indicative reading, to be cross-referenced with composite ESG.
carbon.coverage_high: ≥ 70% — reliable figure, usable for internal reporting.

optimization.title: Constrained Markowitz optimization
optimization.desc: Maximization of mean-variance utility with constraints: sum of weights = 1, weights ≥ 0, floor per asset, ceiling per asset and class, risk budget (target volatility), composite ESG floor. Expected returns are tilted upstream according to your causes (single-tilt pre-optimization) — no double-tilt at the exit to avoid biasing the efficient frontier.

version.title: Engine version
version.desc: Methodology v1.1 · E/S/G pillars weighted by causes, real carbon intensity, source traceability. Revised quarterly.

methodologie.title: Methodology
methodologie.meta_desc: Portfolio construction pipeline: exclusions, best-in-class, constrained Markowitz optimization, conviction tilts.
methodologie.intro: Five transparent and reproducible steps. Adjust the parameters at the bottom of the page to see the portfolio recomposed live.
methodologie.simulator_desc: Any modification below recalculates the allocation according to the complete pipeline.
methodologie.esg_floor_relaxed_desc: With these constraints, the optimizer could not find a portfolio satisfying the minimum ESG score of 70/100. The floor was lifted to produce a viable allocation. The score shown below is the actual score obtained.
methodologie.metric_sharpe_hint: Net of fees and risk-free rate
methodologie.no_positions: No positions retained with these constraints.

stages.2_desc: ~40 multi-class assets: equities, green bonds, thematics, REITs, money market.
stages.3_desc: Hard sector exclusions, then best-in-class ESG (top 50% per class — median).
stages.4_desc: Linear adjustment of expected returns according to your causes (≤ +1.5% per cause). No full Black-Litterman.
stages.5_desc: Constrained Markowitz: max return / variance, bounds per class and composite ESG floor weighted E/S/G according to your causes.

methodologie.reading_p1: You pick what matters to you (causes), what you refuse (exclusions), how much risk you accept and for how long. We instantly rebuild a concrete portfolio that fits your choices.
methodologie.reading_p2: The figures on the right summarise what this portfolio should return, its risk level, fees and footprint. Hover the « ? » for a plain-language explanation of each term.

glossary.markowitz: Markowitz: a mathematical recipe that combines assets to target the best possible return for a given level of risk.
glossary.best_in_class: Best-in-class: we only keep the top half of each category on ESG criteria.
glossary.ter: TER: annual fees taken from a fund (e.g. 0.20% = €2 per year for €1,000 invested).
glossary.esg_acro: ESG: Environment, Social, Governance — the three pillars of responsible finance.

tips.stage_1: Your personal preferences. The raw material for everything else.
tips.stage_2: The toolkit: the list of financial products we can pick from (equities, bonds, real estate…).
tips.stage_3: First we remove what you refuse (e.g. weapons), then we only keep the top performers of each category on ESG criteria.
tips.stage_4: We slightly increase the expected weight of assets aligned with your priority causes. A nudge, not a sledgehammer.
tips.stage_5: A mathematical calculation that combines the remaining assets to target the best possible return at the risk level you chose.
tips.causes: The topics your money should push forward (climate, biodiversity…). The higher the intensity, the more the portfolio leans towards these topics.
tips.exclusions: The sectors you refuse to finance. Ticked = strictly excluded from the portfolio.
tips.risk: How much the portfolio value can move from one year to the next. The higher, the more it can rise… and fall.
tips.horizon: How long you plan to leave this money invested. The longer, the more variation we can accept.
tips.return: What the portfolio could return on average each year, before fees and taxes. Not a guarantee.
tips.volatility: The typical size of annual swings. Volatility 10% ≈ portfolio may swing about ±10% over a year.
tips.sharpe: Return obtained per unit of risk taken. The higher, the better risk is rewarded. Above 1 is very good.
tips.esg: Score out of 100 summarising the environmental, social and governance quality of the portfolio. Higher = stronger impact.
tips.fees: Average annual cost of the products held, automatically deducted from performance. Lower is better.
tips.co2: Estimated tonnes of CO₂ avoided each year for €10,000 invested, compared to a classic portfolio.
tips.carbon_intensity: Grams of CO₂ emitted each year for every euro invested. Real data when the provider publishes it, otherwise unavailable.
tips.carbon_coverage: Share of the portfolio for which we have the official carbon data. The higher, the more reliable the figure.
tips.allocation: The precise list of products selected and the weight of each one in your portfolio.
tips.breakdown: How money is split between major asset families (equities, bonds, real estate…). Good diversification limits surprises.

methodologie.carbon_coverage_advice_none: No portfolio asset publishes official carbon intensity yet. The figure shown remains indicative.
methodologie.carbon_coverage_advice_low: Too few assets publish their carbon footprint. Take the figure with caution.
methodologie.carbon_coverage_advice_mid: Partial coverage: the figure is extrapolated from the documented part of the portfolio.
methodologie.carbon_coverage_advice_high: Good coverage: the figure is reliable for indicative reporting.

asset_detail.impact_overview: Impact overview · monthly deposit over 1 year
asset_detail.co2_unavailable: Carbon impact data not yet available for this asset.

risks.capital_loss_desc: The value of this asset can go down. The invested capital is not guaranteed.
risks.interest_rate_desc: The value falls mechanically if interest rates rise.
risks.credit_risk_desc: An issuer may default on repayment.
risks.market_risk_desc: The ETF follows its index: it falls when the overall market recedes.
risks.currency_risk_desc: Quoted in {{currency}} — fluctuations against the euro impact performance.
risks.specific_risk_desc: A single company: performance depends heavily on its results.
risks.volatility_desc: Individual stocks can experience sharp short-term movements.
risks.thematic_risk_desc: Concentrated sector sensitive to regulation and innovation cycles.

empty_garden.title: Compose your first portfolio.
empty_garden.desc: Four questions to define your convictions. Ethi then structures an allocation aligned with your criteria.

impact_ribbon.co2_avoided_desc: of CO₂ avoided through your investments

impact_hero.headline: Every euro invested reduces carbon footprint and funds the transition.
impact_hero.explainer: CO₂ avoided is an indicative estimate derived from each holding's ESG score. It reflects the footprint reduction from excluding the most carbon-intensive issuers and selecting best-in-class assets. Not a regulatory figure — a directional measure.

intent_cards.what_to_do: What do you want to do?

carbon_neutral.name: Zero footprint
carbon_neutral.description: As much CO₂ avoided as your yearly consumption.

first_harvest.name: First withdrawal
first_harvest.description: You withdrew for a project close to your heart.

allocation_refiner.loading: Measuring the cost of your choices…
allocation_refiner.empty: No notable trade-off detected for this portfolio.
allocation_refiner.title: Refine your allocation
allocation_refiner.desc: Every constraint you set has a measurable cost. Keep it if it matters more than the return it costs you, lift it otherwise. Your choices feed our model.
allocation_refiner.to_lift: Marked to lift. We'll help you recalculate.

holding_detail.no_quote: No quote yet for this asset. Valuation will appear after the next price update.
holding_detail.rejection_title: Why this fund doesn't suit you
holding_detail.rejection_desc: Your feedback is private. We use it to better compose portfolios for users who share your values.
holding_detail.signal_thanks: Thank you. Your signal is recorded — it will feed the automatic fund selection for profiles close to yours.

impact_certificate.title: Issue your personal certificate
impact_certificate.description: A sober, A4-printable page that summarizes your real impact: avoided CO₂, funded green energy, composite ESG score and methodology.

portfolio_metrics.expected_perf_hint: How much your portfolio could grow each year on average. An estimate, not a guarantee.
portfolio_metrics.impact_score_hint: Average ESG score (Environment, Social, Governance) of the portfolio. Higher is better.
portfolio_metrics.co2_hint: Indicative estimate, not a regulatory figure. Tonnes of CO₂ your investment helps avoid per 10,000 € invested each year.
portfolio_metrics.volatility_hint: Volatility: how much your portfolio may move month to month. Higher = more ups and downs.
portfolio_metrics.sharpe_hint: Sharpe ratio: measures whether performance is worth the risk taken. Above 1 = very good.
portfolio_metrics.ter_hint: TER: percentage deducted each year by funds. Lower is better.

comparatif_panel.projection_disclaimer: Illustrative projection based on a constant annual return assumption — not a guarantee or an actual performance track record. Markets vary; your real result may differ significantly.
comparatif_panel.methodology_body: The benchmark uses the average characteristics of a MSCI World UCITS ETF (IWDA / EUNL): long-term annualized performance of 7.2% (net dividends), volatility 15.5%, TER 0.20%, MSCI ESG score ~52, carbon intensity 165 gCO₂e per euro invested.

portfolio_history.no_data: Not enough historical data yet to draw a curve.
portfolio_history.no_data_desc: The curve will appear as soon as several days of quotes are available.

valuation_consistency.title: Valuation gap detected
valuation_consistency.description: The value calculated by the database ({{viewValue}}) differs from the recalculation from weights and quotes ({{expectedValue}}) by <0>{{deltaPct}}%</0> (threshold: {{threshold}}%). Refresh quotes; if the gap persists, the view might need reconstruction.

projection_simulator.contribute_title: What if you invested every month?
projection_simulator.contribute_desc: Projected capital over {{years}} years starting from {{initial}}.
projection_simulator.goal_desc: Required deposit to reach your target in {{years}} years.
projection_simulator.unattainable: Goal unattainable even at the {{max}}/month cap
projection_simulator.unattainable_hint: Increase the horizon, lower the target or choose a more optimistic scenario.

community_panel.be_the_first: Be the first — enable anonymous sharing from your portfolio.

share_toggle.title: Share this portfolio anonymously
share_toggle.description: Only allocation, causes and public metrics are visible. No amounts are shared. Displayed handle:

decision_timeline.empty: No decisions recorded for this portfolio.

real_invest_interest.title: Want to invest this allocation for real?
real_invest_interest.description: Indicate your intent — we'll notify you as soon as real accounts open with our partner broker.
real_invest_interest.cta: I want to invest for real
real_invest_interest.success_desc: We'll contact you by email as soon as real investment is available. Your feedback helps us prioritize the broker partner.
real_invest_interest.dialog_desc: No payment now — just a signal so we can prepare what's next.

command_palette.placeholder: Search a page, portfolio or term…
command_palette.shortcuts_desc: ⌘K palette · g d Dashboard · g p Portfolio · g c Comparison · ? this help

impact_cert.desc: A simple, A4-printable page summarizing your real impact: CO₂ avoided, green energy financed, composite ESG score and methodology.

history_chart.not_enough_data:
Not enough historical data yet to draw a chart.
The chart will appear once several days of quotes are available.

valuation_banner.title: Valuation discrepancy detected
valuation_banner.desc: The value computed by the database ({{viewValue}}) differs from the recalculation based on weights and prices ({{expectedValue}}) by {{deltaPct}}% (threshold: {{threshold}}%). Refresh prices; if the gap persists, the view probably needs rebuilding.

ethi_greetings.rebalance_has_garden: Hey {{name}} — want to rebalance? I'll review your **{{count}} lines** and tell you what to adjust.
ethi_greetings.rebalance_no_garden: Hey {{name}} — no portfolio to rebalance yet. Shall we build one?
ethi_greetings.no_garden: Hi {{name}} ✨ Your portfolio isn't created yet. Tell me what matters to you, and I'll compose it in 2 min.
ethi_greetings.with_quotes: {{name}}, your portfolio runs on **{{invested}} €** invested, **{{count}} lines** and a P&L of **{{pnl}}** 📈. Shall we look at what's next?
ethi_greetings.invested_no_quotes: {{name}}, your portfolio runs on **{{invested}} €** invested and **{{count}} lines**. Shall we look at what's next?
ethi_greetings.ready_no_funds: Hi {{name}} ✨ Your portfolio is ready but not funded yet. Shall we set up a first deposit?
